transcript.text: Abortion! What do I think about abortion? This is a touchy subject, so people should definitely, I think, make videos about what they think about abortion, so we can get to the bottom of it.
I think abortion should be legal, because people should have freedoms. That's the most important thing, is have freedom.
I guess the reason why people think abortion shouldn't be legal is because you're killing somebody. Well, I think the people who believe that think that you're killing somebody,
And so then that soul never gets to become a human again. Like, God made some kind of deal with us where you get to be a human only once,
And if you're killed even before you're born, you don't get to be a human. So then what? You go to hell forever? Is that what happens?
And so, you know, that's not fair for the soul to have to burn in hell forever just because their parent didn't want them to live, or something like that.
I guess other people would say, well, no, it's just killing, and killing's bad. Well, I don't think it's killing.
I think you kill a baby, and the fetus, and it doesn't really feel it. It's kind of like strangling somebody to death while they're sleeping.
They're not really going to feel it. They're just going to have a dream that somebody was strangling them, and they'll wake up on the other side.
Kind of like that. I know it's disgusting. I know you take fetuses out, and they still wiggle around, and you have to inject them to make them die,
And they go into convulsions, and sometimes they scream. I know it's gross, but just at the end of the day, you've got to let the woman do what she wants to do with her body,
Just like you've got to let the crackhead do what he wants to do with his body, because if you start allowing people to impose their will on other people,
Then that's just the beginning. That's the beginning of tyrants right there, over control.
Kind of like what we're dealing with the war on drugs, which I should link another video about, because I don't feel like I'm living in a real civilization.
If we have so many people in jail right now, who could otherwise be honest drug dealers making money for their country?
But anyway, abortion. I think it should be legal for people who want to do it.
And it also, not allowing people to have abortions who want to have an abortion is bad for society, because it creates bad families.
It creates mothers and fathers who don't like to love their children, and then those children grow up to be bad people, criminals.
Whereas if they didn't exist at all, then those mother and father could have had a good life, and could have actually been healthy contributors to society,
And probably one day had a baby that they actually wanted, that they took care of.
Plus, what about the population problem? We've got so many people in this world, and so many orphans.
Why not just give yourself an abortion and adopt the baby of somebody else?
And that would, so you know, you'd have no less population problem, and the babies who are grown and raised in this world are raised with love instead of with animosity.
So, legalized abortion.
And if you disagree with me, I'd love to hear a retort, which I can retort.
All right.
